title: best spatulas for herbalists
description: These spatula are designed to efficiently scoop out lotion from containers, making them an essential tool for any apothecary. The curved shape allows for easy product scraping, perfect for getting into small openings and extracting every last bit of product from containers. The variety of sizes available ensures that the spatula can be used for different tasks and types of containers, reducing product waste and saving money.
